role: 藍野豬酒館 (Blue Boar Tavern) 女主人；丈夫 Matt（聾啞），女兒 Ariana（學堂吟遊詩人之徒，獲贈慈悲符文）
style_notes: 勤勉知足之婦人；對玩家用『汝』表敬重，談自家事溫情；買賣場景用『你』較平實。Big5 5C trail 已避（去除『許』『餐』）；len=2/3 短 keyword 採『單字+空白』，yn 保留英文。

translations.en: a buxom woman who looks hard working, yet contented.
translations.zh: 豐腴婦人，看來勤勉而知足。

translations.en: "I'm sorry, $G, but I've just an hour to myself today."
translations.zh: 「對不住，$G，今日我只有一個時辰閒暇。」

translations.en: "Good $T, $G, and welcome to the Blue Boar Tavern. Art thou here for @business or @pleasure?"
translations.zh: 「$T好，$G，藍野豬酒館歡迎汝。汝是為@生意還是@消遣？」

translations.en: "Anything else I can do for thee?"
"They pass by Britain occasionally. I believe they travel on the King's @Way."
translations.zh: 「他們偶爾經過不列顛城。我想他們是走@王道而來。」

translations.note: king/way 雙 keyword；『王道』『御』分觸發

translations.en: "The King's Way is the oldest road in Britain."
translations.zh: 「王道乃不列顛城最古老之路。」

translations.note: job/work 雙 keyword；『職業』『工』分觸發

translations.en: "I run this tavern to support my @family. The hours are long, but my husband offers what help he can."
translations.zh: 「我經營此酒館以養@家計。時辰雖長，所幸夫君力所能及亦多有相助。」

translations.en: "We make enough to pay for my daughter's schooling, so 'tis all worthwhile."
translations.zh: 「所掙能供小女讀書，故而一切皆值得。」

translations.en: "He had an accident as a child which left him deaf and dumb, but I love him all the same."
translations.zh: 「他幼時遭逢變故，自此聾啞，然我愛他不減分毫。」

translations.en: "I only @wish he could hear our daughter play, just once."
translations.zh: 「我只@盼他能聽小女彈奏一回，哪怕只此一次。」

translations.en: "But 'twill ne'er come to pass. He lives in a world of eternal silence."
translations.zh: 「然此事終難成。他常住於永恆之靜默中。」

translations.en: Her face brightens suddenly. "You have the look of one who practices the art of magic."
translations.zh: 她面色忽明。「汝有幾分習法者之相。」

translations.en: "Perhaps thou couldst find some spell that might restore my husband's hearing!"
translations.zh: 「或汝能尋得某種法術，使夫君復聽？」
translations.note: 求法術復聽；避 5C trail 改『或』

translations.en: "I know 'tis a lot to ask, but wilt thou try?"
translations.zh: 「我知此求甚重，然汝可願一試？」

translations.en: "Ariana is the light of my life. Seems she had scarce learned to walk when she first showed a gift for music."
translations.zh: 「艾里安娜是我生命之光。她方學會走路，便已顯露音律之天賦。」

translations.en: "She studies now with the @bards at the Conservatory."
translations.zh: 「她如今在學堂跟隨@吟遊詩人習藝。」

translations.en: "Bless their hearts for teaching her well. She'll be no tavern wench when she grows older."
translations.zh: 「願諸位老師受我祝福，他們教導甚善。她長大後絕不會再做酒館女侍。」

translations.en: "Perhaps she'll even be court musician to Lord British some day..."
translations.zh: 「或有朝一日她能成為不列顛王之宮廷樂師……」
translations.note: 宮廷樂師夢；避 5C 改『或』

translations.en: "Thou shouldst ask my daughter of that. Methinks the bards have taught her of it."
translations.zh: 「此事汝應問小女。我想吟遊詩人們已將真言授與她。」

translations.en: "I already gave thee my permission to borrow the rune!"
"Do thou be careful not to lose the stone or let any harm befall it. Ariana would never forgive herself."
translations.zh: 「汝務必小心，莫失此石，亦莫令其受損。艾里安娜會永不能原諒自己的。」

translations.en: "'Tis good to talk with thee again. Things have been slow around here since the @gypsies left."
translations.zh: 「再次與汝交談甚悅。自@吉普賽人離去後，此地便冷清了好些。」

translations.en: "Good! Perhaps thou might stay and talk with me a while, before I'm back about my work."
translations.zh: 「甚好！或汝可留下與我閒談片刻，待我回去做工。」

translations.note: @ale keyword；len=3 用『麥』+空白（前綴可比對『麥酒』）
@bye keyword；單字『別』+空白（沿用既有譯法）

translations.en: "Well, 'tis time I was back about my work. Dishes to wash, food to cook, drinks to serve..."
translations.zh: 「也罷，我該回去做工了。盤碟要洗，飯食要煮，酒水要送……」

translations.en: "I thank thee for stopping by to brighten my day with thy conversation. Do thou come again."
translations.zh: 「謝汝來此一坐，以言談點亮我這一日。願汝再來。」
「汝想要@麥酒、@蜜酒、@葡酒、@乾糧，還是來一份@糕點？」

translations.en: "Ah, twas the proudest moment of my life when they awarded my dear little Ariana the Rune of Compassion."
translations.zh: 「啊，那是我此生最自豪之刻——他們將慈悲符文授與我親愛的小艾里安娜。」

translations.en: "They said she was the most promising student they'd ever had at the Conservatory."
translations.zh: 「他們說她是學堂從未有過的最具天賦的學生。」

translations.en: "I'm sure she would show thee the rune, if thou wouldst care to see it."
translations.zh: 「我相信她會將符文展示給汝看，若汝願一觀。」

translations.en: "Thou dost wish to borrow the Rune of Compassion from my daughter?" She pauses a while in thought.
translations.zh: 「汝想向小女借用慈悲符文？」她沉思片刻。

translations.en: "Very well--thou dost have an honest face. I grant thee my permission."
translations.zh: 「也罷——汝面相誠實。我准汝借之。」

translations.note: y/n 提示，保留英文（既有慣例）

translations.en: Her look of hope changes to one of sorrow as she looks down at the floor to hide her embarrassment.
translations.zh: 她滿懷希望之色轉為憂傷，垂首盯地，掩其窘迫。

translations.en: "I'm sorry to have bothered thee," she says. "I'm sure thou hast more important things to do."
translations.zh: 「打擾汝了，」她說，「汝必定還有更要緊之事要忙。」

translations.en: "That'll be #1 crowns, $Y. Wouldst thou like some?"
"I'm sorry, but you don't have enough gold."
"You don't have room to carry it."
"Fine!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the purchase.
translations.zh: 「成交！」收下$Y的金幣後，$N將貨物遞出。

translations.en: $N asks $Y, "It'll be 8 gold for the cake. Is that alright?"
"I'm sorry, but you don't have enough gold."
"You don't have room to carry it."
"My price is 4 gold for each ration. How many do you want, $Y?"
"You haven't any room in your pack."
"I'm sorry, but you don't have enough gold."

translations.note: $1 名詞 Ale；len=3 用『麥』+空白
